## Related



- [ ] **Upstream first** if changing hub behavior or shared assets — merge or pending in **[qbitOS/uvspeed](https://github.com/qbitOS/uvspeed)** (or explain repo-only doc / landing fix).

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets
- [ ] [COMPLIANCE.qmd](COMPLIANCE.qmd) / [NOTICES.md](NOTICES.md) consistent if policy text changed
